en: After this David defeated the Philistines and subdued them, and David took Metheg-ammah out of the hand of the Philistines.
zh: 這事以後，大衛攻打非利士人，制伏了他們。大衛從非利士人手中取得了京城的控制權。

en: And he defeated Moab and he measured them with a line, making them lie down on the ground. Two lines he measured to be put to death, and one full line to be spared. And the Moabites became servants to David and brought tribute.
zh: 他又擊敗摩押人，使他們躺在地上，用繩子量他們，把量兩繩的殺死，讓量一繩的存活。這樣，摩押人就臣服大衛，給他進貢。

en: David also defeated Hadadezer the son of Rehob, king of Zobah, as he went to restore his power at the river Euphrates.
zh: 瑣巴王利合的兒子哈大底謝，往幼發拉底河去要奪回他統治這河的勢力的時候，大衛就攻打他。

en: And David took from him 1,700 horsemen, and 20,000 foot soldiers. And David hamstrung all the chariot horses but left enough for a hundred chariots.
zh: 大衛從他那裡擄獲了戰車一千輛，騎兵七千 ，步兵二萬。大衛把所有戰車的馬的蹄筋都砍斷，只留下一百輛戰車的馬 。

en: And when the Syrians of Damascus came to help Hadadezer king of Zobah, David struck down 22,000 men of the Syrians.
zh: 大馬士革的亞蘭人來協助瑣巴王哈大底謝，大衛就擊殺了亞蘭人二萬二千。

en: Then David put garrisons in Aram of Damascus, and the Syrians became servants to David and brought tribute. And the LORD gave victory to David wherever he went.
zh: 於是大衛在大馬士革的亞蘭地駐軍。這樣亞蘭人就臣服大衛，給他進貢。大衛無論到甚麼地方去，耶和華都使他得勝。

en: And David took the shields of gold that were carried by the servants of Hadadezer and brought them to Jerusalem.
zh: 大衛奪取了哈大底謝臣僕所拿的金盾牌，帶回耶路撒冷。

en: And from Betah and from Berothai, cities of Hadadezer, King David took very much bronze.
zh: 大衛王又從哈大底謝的兩座城比他和比羅他奪取了大量的銅。

en: When Toi king of Hamath heard that David had defeated the whole army of Hadadezer,
zh: 哈馬王陀以聽見大衛打敗了哈大底謝的全軍，

en: Toi sent his son Joram to King David, to ask about his health and to bless him because he had fought against Hadadezer and defeated him, for Hadadezer had often been at war with Toi. And Joram brought with him articles of silver, of gold, and of bronze.
zh: 就差派他的兒子約蘭去見大衛王，向他問安，祝賀他，因為大衛和哈大底謝爭戰，竟擊敗了他。原來陀以常常與哈大底謝爭戰。約蘭手裡還帶著一些銀器、金器和銅器。

en: These also King David dedicated to the LORD, together with the silver and gold that he dedicated from all the nations he subdued,
zh: 大衛王也把這些器皿，連同他從他征服的各國得來的金銀都一起分別為聖，獻給耶和華。

en: from Edom, Moab, the Ammonites, the Philistines, Amalek, and from the spoil of Hadadezer the son of Rehob, king of Zobah.
zh: 就是從以東、摩押、亞捫人、非利士人、亞瑪力人所得來的，以及從瑣巴王利合的兒子哈大底謝獲得的戰利品。

en: And David made a name for himself when he returned from striking down 18,000 Edomites in the Valley of Salt.
zh: 大衛在鹽谷擊殺了一萬八千以東人回來以後，就大有名聲。

en: Then he put garrisons in Edom; throughout all Edom he put garrisons, and all the Edomites became David's servants. And the LORD gave victory to David wherever he went.
zh: 他又在以東設立防軍；他在以東各地都設立防軍，所有以東人就都臣服大衛。大衛無論到甚麼地方去，耶和華都使他得勝。

en: So David reigned over all Israel. And David administered justice and equity to all his people.
zh: 大衛作王統治全以色列，以公平和正義對待所有的人。

en: Joab the son of Zeruiah was over the army, and Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder,
zh: 洗魯雅的兒子約押作軍隊的統帥，亞希律的兒子約沙法作史官，

en: and Zadok the son of Ahitub and Ahimelech the son of Abiathar were priests, and Seraiah was secretary,
zh: 亞希突的兒子撒督和亞比亞他的兒子亞希米勒作祭司長，西萊雅作書記，

en: and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and the Pelethites, and David's sons were priests.
zh: 耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅統管基利提人和比利提人；大衛的眾子都作領袖。
